response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:32: Performer intro. 2. 02:33-05:03: Singing performance of 'Pink Rose'. 3. Detected song title 'Pink Rose', composer 'Konami Arcade Games/Seiya Murai', and lyricist 'Kiyomi Kumano' from on-screen text. 4. Searched for 'Pink Rose Konami lyrics'. Found full lyrics on RemyWiki and Uta-Net. 5. Included the Japanese lyrics and English translation in the JSON response.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introduction by Shiranui Flare followed by a cover performance of the song 'Pink Rose' by Shiranui Flare and Houshou Marine.

scenes.description: The performer, Shiranui Flare, introduces the upcoming performance of 'Pink Rose'. No vocal music is playing.
The song 'Pink Rose' begins. Performers Shiranui Flare and Houshou Marine sing and dance on stage. Text indicates music by Konami Arcade Games (Shigeki Hayashi) and lyrics by Kiyomi Kumano.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ナ・カ・ナ・イ・デ
本当の孤独も知らない
まだ淡い花びらに
涙の粒　抱えたまま…

ah　さわらないで
暖かなその手は
わたしのすべて狂わす

ne　許さないで
傷口押さえて
微笑んでる　あなたがいる
もう　帰れないね

堕ちてく時の　甘い香り
繰り返すたびにひどくなる

ダ・キ・シ・メ・テ
いまだけ　好きだってフリして
たった　ひとつだけなら
ぜんぶ　ぜんぶ　いらない

Bloomin'like a Rose
本当の孤独も知らない
まだ淡い花びらに
涙の粒　抱えたまま
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
P-l-e-a-s-e d-o n-o-t c-r-y
You don't know what it really means to be alone
Like dew on pale flower petals
My tears still cling on...

Ah, don't you touch me
Those hands of yours are so warm
They make me all mixed-up inside

Hey, I won't forgive you
For trying to patch up the wound you left
That smile on your face that you're giving to me
Well, I can't go back from it now

All the times that I fell for that sweet fragrance
It grows worse each moment and it's happening again

H-o-l-d m-e i-n y-o-u-r a-r-m-s
And just this once, pretend you have love in your heart
That's the #1 thing that I wish
I don't, I don't want anything else

Bloomin' like a rose
You don't know what it really means to be alone
Like dew on pale flower petals
My tears still cling on
